name: Color Artist
author: Poki
description: Color Artist is a drawing game where you can create stunning pixel art masterpieces! Pick a painting from a wide variety of collections—whether it’s cute animals, princesses, delicious food, or everyday objects—or let the game surprise you with a random choice. Use helpful tools to simplify your coloring experience and watch your art come to life, pixel by pixel. Are you the Color Artist that we are looking for? How to play Color Artist? Click to apply the color and paint. Who created Color Artist? Color Artist is created by The Good Guys. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Color Artist for free? You can play Color Artist for free on Poki. Can I play Color Artist on mobile devices and desktop? Color Artist can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
